entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The primary crop species being studied for germplasm diversity and geographical gaps.

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic resources, including landraces, conserved for research and breeding.

entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: The facility in India that holds the world's largest collection of pearl millet germplasm.

entities.name: WEST AND CENTRAL AFRICA
entities.description: Region considered the center of diversity for pearl millet and a source of stress-resistant germplasm.

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Living environmental factors that negatively impact crop growth and yield.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that negatively impact crop growth and yield.

entities.name: GEOGRAPHIC INFORMATION SYSTEM
entities.description: Tools used to analyze the geographic origins of landraces to identify collection gaps.

entities.name: FLORAMAP
entities.description: Software used to estimate the probability of pearl millet occurrence in different countries.

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL GAPS
entities.description: Areas where pearl millet germplasm is underrepresented or missing in the genebank collection.

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: Country where major geographical gaps in pearl millet collection were identified.

entities.name: BURKINA FASO
entities.description: Country where major geographical gaps in pearl millet collection were identified.

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: Country where major geographical gaps in pearl millet collection were identified.

entities.name: MAURITANIA
entities.description: Country where major geographical gaps in pearl millet collection were identified.

entities.name: CHAD
entities.description: Country where major geographical gaps in pearl millet collection were identified.

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: Country where major geographical gaps in pearl millet collection were identified.
